releaseNotes:
v1.3.0: mobile redesign - design system, unified cards, Guide tab, perf + a11y

- Token design system: Dimens (spacing/radius), Motion (reduced-motion aware
  pressScale + draw-phase staggered entrance), Surface0-3 hierarchy
- One ChannelCard everywhere: LIVE/quality/favourite/playing states,
  category + source-count metadata line
- Guide promoted to bottom tab; readable EPG rows, date header, NOW badges,
  A-Z fast-scroll rail; filtering/sorting moved off the main thread
- Home: single rail renderer replaces 8 duplicated blocks; refined hero,
  greeting top bar; live-index debounce for the ranking pipeline
- Search: pill tabs, memoized catalogue grouping, bounded-Levenshtein typo
  tolerance fallback
- Player: fixed dead source chips (.clickable never invoked onClick),
  restyled mini player + surf buttons
- Fixed 0-9 See All (hyphen vs en-dash) and Now-line drawing over guide rail
- Removed per-item double-spring entrance (~600 recomposing animations per
  Home render) and O(n^2) indexOf in three grids
- Settings on shared tokens; infinite animations stilled under reduced motion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
